system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output: I'll help you extract the ranking note values from the haystack and compute the SHA-1 hash. Let me start by reading the haystack file.

tool_returns.detail: File content (465.8KB) exceeds maximum allowed size (256KB). Use offset and limit parameters to read specific portions of the file, or search for specific content instead of reading the whole file.

The Riverstone ranking note is top-1, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Storra ranking note is top-2, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Tornmoor ranking note is top-3, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Underholt ranking note is top-4, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Vyport ranking note is top-5, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.

args.command: grep -i -B2 -A2 "ranking note" haystack.txt | grep -E "(Riverstone|Storra|Tornmoor|Underholt|Vyport|ranking note)" | head -30
args.description: Check ranking note context for all entities

args.command: grep -i -C3 "ranking note" haystack.txt | grep -v "confirmed by the regional verification panel"
args.description: Find any ranking note entries that are not confirmed

tool_returns.detail:

--

Local archives indicate the Olspere manifest register was last updated in winter 2012 with a regional addendum covering compendium adjustments approved by the sectional review committee.

--

According to the 1990 field report compiled by the regional bureau, the schedule index for Elwick stood at 373.4 units after the spring survey, with annual variations noted in subsequent summary addenda.


The provisional index of Carrick was formally recorded in the autumn 2002 catalogue along with seven adjacent ledger entries covering the quarterly oversight period.

--

The 1985 summer compilation of Halewick dispatch records included 182.2 index cross-references and a consolidated appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.


Regional observers in Quenwick noted a marginal pattern of register during the spring 2006 cycle that prompted a preliminary addendum filed by the directory secretariat for archival reference.
